title: Artificial Intelligence Misuse: Teen Scandal at Exclusive Pennsylvania School
description: In Pennsylvania, two 14-year-old boys used AI to create fake nude images of classmates, causing distress and legal consequences. Found guilty, they received probation and must perform community service. The scandal has spurred discussions on AI misuse and legal actions, highlighting deepfake-related issues in schools and broader society.
content: The scandal at an elite Pennsylvania school has left a community in shock after two teenage boys were found guilty of using artificial intelligence to create fake nude images of their classmates. The boys, aged 14, received probation on Wednesday aft... [747 chars]

title: AI tool predicts wildfire danger faster than current systems
description: A wildfire forecasting system powered by artificial intelligence (AI) could help detect dangerous fire conditions earlier and reduce the cost of wildfire response, according to new research from Te Whare Wānanga o Waitaha, University of Canterbury (UC). The work is published in the International Journal of Wildland Fire.

title: Q&A: An AI-Powered Way to Help Detect Brain Bleeds Faster
description: Viz Hemorrhage, which uses artificial intelligence algorithms to detect suspected brain bleeds, is a recipient of the 2026 Edison Awards.
content:

title: Ending OpenAI's Sora unlikely to slow influx of AI-generated video online, experts say

title: Are we relying too heavily on artificial intelligence for emotional support?
description: What began as a helpful tool is becoming something more personal — and, for some, more powerful than human advice.

title: OpenAI pulls plug on Sora, the viral AI video app that sparked deepfake concerns
